event_world_42_20260423_180342_0000.name: K-pop Galaxy Tour
event_world_42_20260423_180342_0000.description: The world-sensation aespa is in town! Get ready for an unforgettable night of dynamic electronic dance music and stunning holographic visuals.

reviews.text: The venue's natural amphitheatre setting made even quieter moments feel dramatic and resonant.
Confusing layout and poor signage made it hard to navigate between stages.
The concept was interesting but execution felt rushed and under-rehearsed.

event_world_42_20260423_180342_0001.name: Organic Farmers Market
event_world_42_20260423_180342_0001.description: Every Sunday, local farmers bring fresh seasonal produce, homemade preserves, and foraged ingredients directly to city-centre buyers — no middlemen, all flavour.

reviews.text: Parking chaos added two hours to our evening and the toilet facilities were disgraceful.
Decent event overall though the merchandise stall ran out of programmes by midday.
Average experience — neither the worst nor the best event I have attended this year.

event_world_42_20260423_180342_0002.name: International Film Noir Festival
event_world_42_20260423_180342_0002.description: Five days of classic and contemporary noir from 20 countries, with director Q&As, restored 35mm screenings, and late-night double features.

reviews.text: Performers were 90 minutes late and the cancellation announcement came via a single tweet.

event_world_42_20260423_180342_0003.name: City Half Marathon
